title: What is Kafka?
description: Introduction to Apache Kafka — a distributed event streaming platform. Learn the core concepts: topics, partitions, brokers, and how Kafka fits into modern architectures.

title: Topics & Partitions
description: Deep dive into Kafka topics, partitions, replication, and partitioning strategies. Understand how data is organized and scaled.

title: Producers
description: How to write data to Kafka. Producer APIs, batching, acknowledgements, idempotency, and key-based partitioning.

title: Consumers & Consumer Groups
description: Reading data from Kafka. Consumer groups, offset management, rebalancing, and exactly-once semantics.
